name: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 Magnetic Charger
shortDescription: 3-in-1 stand charger for iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods.
description: Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 offers tidy bedside charging with magnetic alignment and simultaneous charging for Apple devices.

comments.name: Monika
comments.text: Very clean setup and reliable overnight charging.
